title: erysimum helveticum subsp. pumilum
intro: Erysimum helveticum subsp. pumilum, commonly known as Alpine Wallflower or Alpine Wallflower Cress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alpine Wallflower Cress include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antiseptic. Alpine Wallflower Cress can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
